title: Elaphoglossum praelongum
taxonomy: Elaphoglossum praelongum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is a part of the genus Elaphoglossum, which consists of approximately 1200 species of epiphytic ferns. The family Dryopteridaceae is a large and diverse group of ferns, commonly known as the wood fern family. Elaphoglossum praelongum is native to tropical and subtropical regions, including Central and South America. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its environment.
